lead_summary: The lead is interested in automating customer follow-up.
recommended_next_step: Ask about current follow-up volume and target response time.
suggested_email_reply: Hi Michael, thanks for reaching out. I can help review your current follow-up process and identify automation opportunities. Could you share your current lead volume and response workflow?
suggested_sms_reply: Hi Michael, thanks for your interest. Could you share your current lead volume and follow-up process?
